title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 02 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 02 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 02 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/12/2025
DCE iron ore futures rose in early trading before pulling back slightly. The most-traded contract I2601 hit a high of 804.5 and finally closed at 800.5,up 0.5% from the previous working day. Traders sold at market prices; steel mills held a bearish outlook on future ore prices, showing moderate purchase willingness.
